problem id: 455b6b61
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  11001111 -> 00001100
  11001101 -> 00000100
  00101010 -> 10100010
  11101000 -> 10011001
  10101011 -> 10000100
  01101000 -> 10111011
  10110011 -> 11100010
  01101010 -> 10110011

query: 00001110
predicted answer: 00111011
